hotels.name: Hotel Montmartre de Sapa
hotels.description_fr:
Lﾃ｢竄ｬ邃｢ﾃδｩtablissement Hotel Montmartre de Sapa se situe ﾃδ Sa Pa, ﾃδ 2,5 km de ce lieu dﾃ｢竄ｬ邃｢intﾃδｩrﾃδｪt : Arrﾃδｪt du tﾃδｩlﾃδｩphﾃδｩrique Fansipan Legend. Il comprend de nombreuses installations, notamment une terrasse, un restaurant et un bar. Il est installﾃδｩ ﾃδ proximitﾃδｩ de plusieurs attractions connues, notamment ﾃδ respectivement 1 km, 900 mﾃδｨtres et 1,2 km de : Lac de Sapa, Sa Pa Stone Church et Sa Pa Bus Station. Lﾃ｢竄ｬ邃｢ﾃδｩtablissement possﾃδｨde une rﾃδｩception ouverte 24h/24, des transferts aﾃδｩroport, un service d'ﾃδｩtage et une connexion Wi-Fi gratuite dans lﾃ｢竄ｬ邃｢ensemble de ses locaux.

Lﾃ｢竄ｬ邃｢ﾃδｩtablissement propose des hﾃδｩbergements dotﾃδｩs de la climatisation, dﾃ｢竄ｬ邃｢un bureau, dﾃ｢竄ｬ邃｢une bouilloire, dﾃ｢竄ｬ邃｢un rﾃδｩfrigﾃδｩrateur, dﾃ｢竄ｬ邃｢un minibar, dﾃ｢竄ｬ邃｢un coffre-fort et dﾃ｢竄ｬ邃｢une tﾃδｩlﾃδｩvision ﾃδ ﾃδｩcran plat.
hotels.description_en:
Comfortable Accommodations: Hotel Montmartre de Sapa in Sa Pa offers family rooms with air-conditioning, private bathrooms, and balconies. Each room includes a work desk, minibar, and free WiFi.
Dining Experience: The modern restaurant serves Vietnamese, Asian, European, and barbecue grill cuisines. Guests can enjoy lunch and dinner in a family-friendly or romantic ambience. Vegetarian options are available.
Leisure Facilities: The hotel features spa facilities, a terrace, and a bar. Additional amenities include a fitness centre, sauna, and yoga classes.
Local Attractions: Sa Pa Lake is a 12-minute walk away, while Sa Pa Stone Church lies less than 1 km from the property. Other nearby attractions include Ham Rong Garden and Fansipan Mountain.
hotels.description_es:
Hotel Montmartre de Sapa se encuentra en Sapa, a 2,5 km de Estaciﾃδｳn del telefﾃδｩrico a Fansipan, y ofrece equipamiento como terraza, restaurante y bar. El alojamiento estﾃδ｡ cerca de varios lugares de interﾃδｩs destacados, a unos 12 min a pie de Lago Sa Pa, a 900 metros de Sa Pa Stone Church y a 14 min a pie de Sa Pa Bus Station. El alojamiento ofrece recepciﾃδｳn 24 horas, traslado para ir o volver del aeropuerto, servicio de habitaciones y wifi gratis en todo el alojamiento.

El hotel ofrece habitaciones con aire acondicionado, escritorio, hervidor, nevera, minibar, caja fuerte, TV de pantalla plana y baﾃδｱo privado con ducha. Todas las unidades disponen de armario.

A cerca de 2,5 km de Estaﾃδｧﾃδ｣o de Telefﾃδｩrico de Fansipan Legend, Hotel Montmartre de Sapa encontra-se em Sa Pa e apresenta vﾃδ｡rias comodidades, incluindo um terraﾃδｧo, um restaurante e um bar. O alojamento estﾃδ｡ a cerca de 21 km de Montanha Fansipan, a 1,8 km de Ham Rong Garden - Ham Rong Mountain e a 11 km de Vale de Moung Hoa. O alojamento dispﾃδｵe de receﾃδｧﾃδ｣o aberta 24 horas, transfers do aeroporto, serviﾃδｧo de quartos e acesso Wi-Fi gratuito em toda a propriedade.

hotels.description_it:
Posizionato a 2,5 km da Funivia Fansipan Legend, a Sa Pa, Hotel Montmartre de Sapa presenta una serie di servizi tra cui una terrazza, un ristorante e un bar. La struttura si trova a circa 21 km da Fan Si Pan, 1,8 km da Ham Rong Garden - Ham Rong Mountain e 11 km da Valle di Muong Hoa. L'alloggio mette a disposizione una reception 24 ore su 24, transfer aeroportuali, il servizo in camera e il WiFi gratuito in tutta la struttura.

Questo hotel offre agli ospiti camere climatizzate dotate di scrivania, bollitore elettrico, frigorifero, minibar, cassaforte, TV a schermo piatto e bagno privato con doccia. Tutte le unitﾃδ presentano un armadio.

Presso Hotel Montmartre de Sapa potrete gustare una colazione a buffet.

hotels.name: Sapa Horizon Hotel & Skybar
hotels.description_fr:
Bﾃδｩnﾃδｩficiant d'un emplacement central ﾃδ moins de 50ﾃつmﾃδｨtres du cﾃδｩlﾃδｨbre marchﾃδｩ de Sa Pa et de l'ﾃδｩglise Nha Tho Da, le Sapa Horizon Hotel & Skybar offre une vue pittoresque sur la montagne. Une connexion Wi-Fi est disponible gratuitement dans l'ensemble de l'ﾃδｩtablissement.
Dﾃδｩcorﾃδｩes avec goﾃδｻt, les chambres disposent d'un coin salon et d'une tﾃδｩlﾃδｩvision par satellite. Elles sont ﾃδｩgalement dotﾃδｩes d'un plateau/bouilloire et d'un minibar. Leur salle de bains privative est pourvue d'une douche ou d'une baignoire et d'articles de toilette gratuits.
Le personnel de la rﾃδｩception ouverte 24h/24 assure des services de bagagerie, de blanchisserie, de repassage et de location de vﾃδｩlos.
Vous pourrez prendre vos repas au restaurant Authentic Sapa, servant une cuisine asiatique et internationale.
hotels.description_en:
Centrally located within 50 metres of the popular Nha Tho Da Church, Sapa Horizon Hotel & Skybar offers picturesque mountain views and free WiFi access throughout its premises.
Tastefully furnished rooms are fitted with a TV with satellite channels and a seating area. Tea/coffee making amenities and a minibar are included. The en suite bathroom comes with a shower or bathtub and free toiletries.
The 24-hour front desk staff will be happy to assist with luggage storage, laundry/ironing services and bicycle rental services.
Guests can dine at Authentic Sapa Restaurant, which offers Asian and international cuisines. Room service is also available.
Sa Pa Lake is 500 metres from Sapa Horizon Hotel & Skybar, while Fansipan Legend Cable Car Station is 1.9 km away.
hotels.description_es:
Descubre cﾃδｳmo se sienten las estrellas con el mejor servicio en el Sapa Horizon Hotel & Skybar
El Sapa Horizon Hotel & Skybar estﾃδ｡ situado en el centro, a 50 metros de la famosa iglesia Nha Tho Da, y ofrece bonitas vistas a las montaﾃδｱas y WiFi gratuita en todas las instalaciones.
Las habitaciones, muy bien decoradas, disponen de TV vﾃδｭa satﾃδｩlite y zona de estar. Cuentan con minibar y set de tﾃδｩ y cafﾃδｩ. El baﾃδｱo privado estﾃδ｡ equipado con ducha o baﾃδｱera y artﾃδｭculos de aseo gratuitos.
La recepciﾃδｳn estﾃδ｡ disponible las 24 horas. Hay consigna de equipaje y servicios de lavanderﾃδｭa/planchado y de alquiler de bicicletas.
Los huﾃδｩspedes pueden comer en el restaurante Authentic Sapa, que prepara platos asiﾃδ｡ticos e internacionales. Se presta servicio de habitaciones.
hotels.description_pt:
Sinta-se como uma celebridade com o serviﾃδｧo de topo de Sapa Horizon Hotel & Skybar
Centrally located within 50 metres of the popular Nha Tho Da Church, Sapa Horizon Hotel & Skybar offers picturesque mountain views and free WiFi access throughout its premises.
Tastefully furnished rooms are fitted with a TV with satellite channels and a seating area. Tea/coffee making amenities and a minibar are included. The en suite bathroom comes with a shower or bathtub and free toiletries.

Vivi un'esperienza esclusiva con il servizio di prima classe presso Sapa Horizon Hotel & Skybar
Situato in posizione centrale a 50 metri dal famoso mercato di Sa Pa e dalla Chiesa di Nha Tho Da, il Sapa Horizon Hotel & Skybar offre viste pittoresche sulle montagne e il WiFi gratuito in tutti gli ambienti.
Arredate con gusto, le camere sono dotate di TV con canali satellitari, area salotto, set per la preparazione di tﾃδｨ/caffﾃδｨ, minibar e bagno interno con doccia o vasca e set di cortesia.

Non perdete di cenare presso l'Authentic Sapa Restaurant, che offre piatti della cucina asiatica e internazionale.

hotels.name: Hotel de la Coupole - MGallery
hotels.description_fr:
Installﾃδｩ ﾃδ Sa Pa, l'Hotel de la Coupole - MGallery dispose d'une piscine intﾃδｩrieure chauffﾃδｩe, d'un spa et d'une salle de sport.
Inspirﾃδｩes des tribus minoritaires de Sa Pa et de la haute couture franﾃδｧaise, toutes les chambres de lﾃ｢竄ｬ邃｢ﾃδｩtablissement bﾃδｩnﾃδｩficient dﾃ｢竄ｬ邃｢un balcon et de la climatisation. Elles sont ﾃδｩquipﾃδｩes dﾃ｢竄ｬ邃｢une tﾃδｩlﾃδｩvision par satellite ﾃδ ﾃδｩcran plat, dﾃ｢竄ｬ邃｢une bouilloire et dﾃ｢竄ｬ邃｢une armoire. Leur salle de bains privative est pourvue dﾃ｢竄ｬ邃｢une baignoire et dﾃ｢竄ｬ邃｢articles de toilette gratuits. Certains logements offrent une vue sur le jardin. Tous comportent un coin salon.
Le matin, vous aurez lﾃ｢竄ｬ邃｢occasion de dﾃδｩguster un petit-dﾃδｩjeuner buffet ou continental. Ouvert toute la journﾃδｩe, le restaurant franﾃδｧais sur place, le Chic, prﾃδｩpare une cuisine vietnamienne locale.
hotels.description_en:
Situated in Sa Pa, Hotel de la Coupole - MGallery features a heated indoor swimming pool, spa and fitness centre.
Inspired from the minority tribes in Sapa and French Haute Couture, all rooms at the property offer a balcony, air conditioning, a flat-screen TV with satellite channels, a kettle, a hot tub, free toiletries and a wardrobe. Rooms are fitted with a private bathroom, while some feature a garden view. All guest rooms are equipped with a seating area.
The hotel offers a continental or buffet breakfast. Guests can grab a bite to eat in the on-site restaurant, Chic - a french restaurant open all day also offering local Vietnamese cuisine.
hotels.description_es:
Descubre cﾃδｳmo se sienten las estrellas con el mejor servicio en el Hotel de la Coupole - MGallery

El Hotel de la Coupole - MGallery estﾃδ｡ situado en Sa Pa y cuenta con piscina cubierta climatizada, spa y centro de fitness.

Todas las habitaciones del establecimiento, inspiradas en las tribus minoritarias de Sapa y en la alta costura francesa, cuentan con balcﾃδｳn, aire acondicionado, TV de pantalla plana vﾃδｭa satﾃδｩlite, hervidor de agua, baﾃδｱera de hidromasaje, artﾃδｭculos de aseo gratuitos y armario. Los baﾃδｱos son privados, y algunas habitaciones tienen vistas al jardﾃδｭn. Todas disponen de zona de estar.

El hotel sirve un desayuno buffet o continental. El restaurante francﾃδｩs del hotel, el Chic, estﾃδ｡ abierto todo el dﾃδｭa y ofrece cocina local vietnamita.

Sinta-se como uma celebridade com o serviﾃδｧo de topo de Hotel de la Coupole - MGallery

Situado em Sapa, o Hotel de la Coupole - MGallery disponibiliza piscina interior aquecida, spa e centro de fitness.

Inspirados nas tribos minoritﾃδ｡rias de Sapa e na Alta Costura francesa, todos os quartos da propriedade tﾃδｪm uma varanda, ar condicionado, televisﾃδ｣o de ecrﾃδ｣ plano com canais por satﾃδｩlite, chaleira, banheira de hidromassagem, produtos de higiene pessoal gratuitos e roupeiro. hotels.description_it:
Vivi un'esperienza esclusiva con il servizio di prima classe presso Hotel de la Coupole - MGallery

Situato a Sa Pa, l'Hotel de la Coupole - MGallery vanta una piscina coperta riscaldata, un centro benessere e un centro fitness.

Ispirate alle minoranze etniche di Sa Pa e all'alta moda francese, tutte le camere sono dotate di balcone, aria condizionata, TV satellitare a schermo piatto, bollitore, armadio, area salotto e bagno privato con vasca idromassaggio e set di cortesia, mentre alcune regalano una vista sul giardino.
